category_sources: Official IF Archive index describes Iain Merrick's Git as a Glulx interpreter optimized for speed.
source_facts.description says it is a Glulx interpreter optimized for speed.
display_name_sources: Official IF Archive index names the project Git.
source_facts.name is git-if, the Homebrew formula name used to disambiguate it from the version-control system.
docs_sources: Official IF Archive project directory is the best official documentation and distribution surface available in source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: Official IF Archive provides source archives, but no official source-control project URL was identified from official sources.
tags_sources: Official IF Archive index describes the interpreter and source archive.
